visual_analysis: The visual quality is high due to a clean layout, well-organized content, and a cohesive color scheme that enhances readability. The typography is modern and legible, contributing to an overall appealing design that maintains user engagement.
educational_analysis: The educational quality is also strong, presenting clear explanations of Big-Theta notation with appropriate visual aids that illustrate key concepts. Instructional elements like examples and a visual representation of the concepts help clarify the educational objectives effectively.
